chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.S-287 of 2025 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 11-09-2025 Mr. Abdul Rehman Bhutto, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General. -------- Mr. Abdul Ghani Bijarani files power on behalf of respondent No.13, taken on record and submits that the private respondents have not caused any harassment to the petitioner but the petitioner party had committed a wrong for which an FIR NO. 124/2024 and 116/2025 stand registered at police station Kashmore. The SHO police station Buxapur respondent No.6, SHO police station R.D-109 respondent No.3 and respondent No.7 SSP Kashmore @ Kandhkot have filed their replies wherein they have stated that they will act in accordance with the law and will not cause any harassment to the petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied for the undertaking given by the official respondents and seeks disposal of this petition. Order accordingly. The official respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law that they shall not cause any harassment to any person in any manner. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
